title: 'Rape gangs': UK MP demands deportation of Pakistani men linked to grooming gangs
summary_full: A UK MP has revealed harrowing testimonies from grooming gang abuse survivors, alleging race and religion were used to justify their mistreatment. He plans to use parliamentary privilege to name perpetrators and enablers, while pursuing private prosecutions due to low faith in the justice system.
